articles.title: Karen Read’s SUV heads to auction in Woburn. Here’s what readers think it’s worth.
articles.description:
The 2021 Lexus LX 570 tied to the Karen Read case could sell for anywhere from market value to more than half a million dollars, readers say.

The post Karen Read’s SUV heads to auction in Woburn. Here’s what readers think it’s worth. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Karen Read's 2021 Lexus LX 570 will be auctioned in Woburn.
Bidders estimate the SUV's value between market price and over $500,000.
The auction outcome may influence local discussions on high-profile criminal cases.

articles.title: Shooting on Memorial Drive in Cambridge leaves ‘at least’ one wounded, police say
articles.description:
Massachusetts State Police described the incident as a “police-involved shooting” and said troopers were involved, though they did not offer specifics. 

The post Shooting on Memorial Drive in Cambridge leaves ‘at least’ one wounded, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police-involved shooting on Memorial Drive in Cambridge leaves at least one person wounded.
Massachusetts State Police confirmed troopers were involved in the incident on May 11, 2026.
Residents may experience increased police presence and heightened safety concerns in the area.

articles.title: Police investigating viral video of apparent food contamination at McDonald’s in Mass.
articles.description:
The video appears to show a local McDonald’s employee stuffing french fries into her mouth before repackaging them in a to-go container.

The post Police investigating viral video of apparent food contamination at McDonald’s in Mass. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police are investigating a viral video showing food contamination at a Southbridge McDonald's.
The video depicts an employee repackaging fries after eating them, raising health concerns.
Local residents are urged to report any similar incidents to ensure food safety.

articles.title: MassINC poll: Many Bay Staters say their quality of life is slipping in Mass.
articles.description:
Less than a third of residents polled expected their finances to improve over the coming year.

The post MassINC poll: Many Bay Staters say their quality of life is slipping in Mass. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Less than one-third of Bay State residents expect financial improvement in the next year.
MassINC poll reveals declining quality of life concerns among Massachusetts residents.
Residents may face increased economic challenges affecting local communities and services.

articles.title: Celtics reportedly tried to land Giannis Antetokounmpo at the trade deadline
articles.description:
The Celtics were among several playoff teams that reportedly pursued the two-time MVP.

The post Celtics reportedly tried to land Giannis Antetokounmpo at the trade deadline appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics pursued Giannis Antetokounmpo during the trade deadline for playoff enhancement.
Several playoff teams, including the Celtics, aimed to acquire the two-time MVP.
This move reflects Celtics' commitment to strengthening their roster for Boston fans.

articles.title: Student charged in Danvers home invasion murder appears in court
articles.description:
The court entered a not guilty plea on Anthony DeMayo’s behalf as he attended the hearing remotely from Bridgewater State Hospital.

The post Student charged in Danvers home invasion murder appears in court appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Anthony DeMayo, a student, charged in Danvers home invasion murder appears in court remotely.
Court entered a not guilty plea for DeMayo during the hearing on May 11, 2026.
Local residents express concern over safety following the violent incident in their community.

articles.title: Mass. Senate passes bill to protect immigrants, with notable differences from House version
articles.description:
Many lawmakers support reining in ICE, but the House and Senate will have to find a compromise before Gov. Maura Healey can sign off.

The post Mass. Senate passes bill to protect immigrants, with notable differences from House version appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts Senate passed an immigrant protection bill on May 11, 2026.
Lawmakers aim to limit ICE's powers, differing from the House version.
Governor Maura Healey awaits a compromise to finalize the legislation.

articles.title: Kevin Garnett, Paul Pierce analyze what went wrong with ‘robotic’ Celtics offense
articles.description:
"Ain't nobody looking at the basket. Ain't nobody thinking downhill."

The post Kevin Garnett, Paul Pierce analyze what went wrong with ‘robotic’ Celtics offense appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kevin Garnett and Paul Pierce criticized the Celtics' offense for being 'robotic' and ineffective.
Garnett noted players are not looking at the basket or attacking the rim during games.
This analysis highlights concerns for Boston fans about the team's performance in upcoming playoffs.

articles.title: Waiting in line in Boston is brutal. Some spots are still worth it.
articles.description:
We asked customers waiting outside some of Boston’s busiest restaurants and cafes why the line is worth it.

The post Waiting in line in Boston is brutal. Some spots are still worth it. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston residents endure long lines at popular restaurants and cafes for quality food experiences.
Customers reported waiting up to 90 minutes at spots like Mike's Pastry and Flour Bakery.
Long waits indicate strong demand, impacting local dining trends and restaurant popularity.
